must_change_password.description: Does this user need to change their password (e.g., after assigning a temp password)

disabled.description: Has this user been disabled from the system

days_to_expiry.description: How many days until this user expires

mins_to_unlock.description: How many minutes until the account is unlocked after multiple failed logins

default_warehouse.description: The default warehouse to use when this user starts a session

default_namespace.description: The default namespace to use when this user starts a session

default_role.description: The default role to use when this user starts a session

default_secondary_roles.description: The default secondary roles of this user to use when starting a session. Only valid set values are ALL or NONE. Default is ALL after 2024-07 BCR.

mins_to_bypass_mfa.description: How many minutes until MFA is required again

rsa_public_key.description: RSA public key of the user

rsa_public_key_2.description: Second RSA public key of the user

type.description: Indicates the type of user (PERSON | SERVICE | LEGACY_SERVICE)

enable_unredacted_query_syntax_error.description: Whether to show unredacted query syntax errors in the query history.

network_policy.description: Specifies an existing network policy is active for the user. Otherwise, use account default.

rsa_public_key_fp.description: Fingerprint of the user's RSA public key

rsa_public_key_2_fp.description: Fingerprint of the user's second RSA public key

snowflake_lock.description: Whether the user, account, or organization is locked by Snowflake.

snowflake_support.description: Whether Snowflake Support is allowed to use the user or account

mins_to_bypass_network_policy.description: Temporary bypass network policy on the user for a specified number of minutes

custom_landing_page_url_flush_next_ui_lo.description: Whether or not to flush the custom landing page of the user on next UI load
